# robots.txt for Fondation Mariam Website

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*.xml$
Disallow: /node_modules/

# Specific crawlers
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

# Crawl delay in milliseconds
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://fondation-mariam.org/sitemap.xml
